steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: After describing an analytical method, the text reveals its conclusion. The transition must mark this progression.

steps.title: Match to the outcome
steps.content:
”Ultimately” signals a concluding thought—the final finding after an investigation.

In this sentence, it fits: after describing the OSL analysis, “Ultimately, OSL dating indicated...” presents the conclusion of that analysis.

The other three either introduce parallels (Similarly), add information (In addition), or require comparison (By comparison), none of which signal a conclusion after a process.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
